name: sulis
description: Sulis — the canonical front-door plugin for the Sulis AI marketplace. Hosts the founder-facing concierge agent + journey skills (start/handoff/status) and the meta-skill methodology (add-skill) used to author other plugins. Founders interact via /sulis:* commands; specialist domain plugins (srd/sea/sulis-execution/sulis-security/etc) remain operator-facing internals.
